benefits.description: Testosterone approximately 50% higher than ever before, measured ~2 months after completing ~1 month supply of several Khavinson peptides (including testicle, lungs, liver, and others). No other changes to diet, lifting, or lifestyle.

protocol_notes: Commenter took sublingual Khavinson peptides for about a month (several types including testicle, lungs, liver, and others). Blood tests ~2 months later showed testosterone ~50% higher than it had ever been. No dietary, training, or lifestyle changes made.
